scope: Pass B full-surface expansion against Concord's published OpenAPI spec (117 documented method+path combinations across 77 unique paths). This bundle covers every practical GET list/detail read (25 streams, up from 5) and every dialect-expressible non-destructive-admin write action (13 write actions across folders/reports/clauses/groups/approvals: create+update+delete except groups, which the API exposes no DELETE for). Excluded: agreement-content-mutating writes (create/patch/sign/renew agreement and its clauses/fields/versions/members/comments/attachments/branding/webhooks/rules/integration-export) -- Concord's own AgreementCreate schema alone is a deeply nested templating/source-agreement/parameter-replacement shape not safely reducible to a flat JSON write action without risking silent mis-mapping of legally-binding contract content, and every legally-consequential signature/renewal/negotiation-membership action is out of scope for this pass; binary-payload endpoints (PDF/DOCX export, attachment upload/download, logo upload); and organization-provisioning (create org). Every excluded endpoint below carries the specific reason it was not modeled, not a blanket bucket.

excluded.reason: creates a brand-new Concord organization (tenant-level provisioning), not a resource within the configured organization_id this connector operates inside.

AgreementCreate's own schema is a deeply nested templating/source-agreement/parameter-replacement shape (create from template, copy from contract, draft creation) not safely reducible to a flat JSON write action without risking silent mis-mapping of legally-binding contract content; deferred pending a dedicated schema review.
permanently deletes a signed/negotiated legal agreement and its full history; destructive beyond this pass's write scope (folders/reports/clauses/groups/approvals only).
partial agreement metadata patch; deferred alongside agreement creation (same content-mutation review needed before modeling).
returns a binary Word document, not structured record data.
returns a binary PDF document, not structured record data.
discards an in-flight approval from an agreement negotiation; deferred pending a dedicated review of the agreement-negotiation write surface.
the approval workflow instance attached to one specific agreement; a distinct per-agreement sub-resource from the org-level approvals stream already covered, deferred pending its own schema review.
replaces the approval workflow on a live agreement negotiation; deferred alongside the read side.
returns the raw attachment file content, not structured record data (the attachments LIST endpoint, already covered, returns the structured metadata).
uploads binary attachment content to an agreement; a multipart/binary-payload write not modeled this pass.
deletes an agreement attachment; deferred alongside attachment upload.
updates attachment metadata; deferred alongside attachment upload.
adds or updates a comment thread on a live agreement negotiation; deferred pending a dedicated review of the agreement-negotiation write surface.
moves an agreement to a different folder; a targeted single-field agreement mutation deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion above.
exports an agreement to a third-party integration (e.g. Salesforce); an outbound side-effecting action, not a data mutation this connector's write model represents.
invites a new member into a live agreement negotiation; deferred pending a dedicated review of the agreement-negotiation write surface.
adds a delayed invitation to an agreement; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
removes a delayed invitation from a negotiation; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
edits a delayed invitation's negotiation permission; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
sends a pending delayed invitation; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
removes an invited user from a negotiation; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
edits an invited user's negotiation permission; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
joins the calling user into an agreement negotiation; a session-bound action, not a bulk-syncable mutation.
removes the calling user from a negotiation; a session-bound action, not a bulk-syncable mutation.
removes an active member from a negotiation; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
edits an active member's negotiation permission; deferred alongside the broader agreement-negotiation write exclusion.
updates agreement metadata (title/description/tags/status); deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
returns the folder-path breadcrumb for an agreement, derivable from the already-covered agreement/folder streams' folderId/parentId chain; not modeled as a separate stream.
sends an action to an automation rule on a live agreement; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
revokes all signatures on an agreement, a legally-consequential destructive action out of scope for this pass.
e-signature metadata for one specific agreement; deferred pending its own schema review, distinct from the metadata/summary sub-resources already covered.
modifies in-flight signature metadata; deferred alongside the signing-flow exclusion.
completes the signing flow on a live agreement; a legally-consequential action out of scope for this pass.
requests e-signature on a live agreement, a legally-consequential action out of scope for this pass.
reconfigures signature slot assignments on an agreement; deferred alongside the signing-flow exclusion.
adds a clause instance to a live agreement; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
removes a clause instance from a live agreement; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
single-clause detail already enumerable via the covered agreement_summary stream's clauses array.
updates a clause instance on a live agreement; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
renews a live agreement (creates a new end-clause/term extension); a legally-consequential action out of scope for this pass.
the most-recent end-clause, already enumerable via the covered agreement_summary stream's endclauses array.
updates the current end-clause/renewal terms; deferred alongside the renewal-mutation exclusion above.
cancels an agreement renewal; deferred alongside the renewal-mutation exclusion above.
single end-clause detail already enumerable via the covered agreement_summary stream's endclauses array.
custom summary-field definitions for one agreement; a distinct nested sub-resource from the summary object already covered, deferred pending its own schema review.
creates a custom summary field on an agreement; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
deletes a custom summary field; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
updates a custom summary field; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
updates the agreement lifecycle stage (e.g. force-expire/renew state machine transition); a legally-consequential action out of scope for this pass.
links two agreements together; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
removes a link between agreements; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
updates the "signed with" party labels on an agreement; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
in-document track-changes/redline data for one agreement version; a distinct document-content sub-resource deferred pending its own schema review.

a computed diff between two agreement versions (requires two version-id query params to select the comparison pair); a distinct on-demand-computation shape, not a listable resource, deferred pending its own schema review.
the most-recent version, already enumerable via the covered agreement_versions stream (its first/last element by date).
template field values from the latest version; deferred pending its own schema review, distinct from the version metadata already covered.
fills template field values on the latest version; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
fills PDF form fields on the latest version; deferred alongside the broader agreement-content-mutation exclusion.
uploads a new agreement version from a PDF/Word file; a multipart/binary-payload write not modeled this pass.
instantiates an agreement from an automated template; deferred alongside the broader agreement-creation exclusion.
org-wide branding/white-label configuration change; an organization-admin-level setting outside this pass's write scope.
deletes org email branding configuration; organization-admin-level setting outside this pass's write scope.
creates a custom email domain for org branding; organization-admin-level setting outside this pass's write scope.
org-wide email-sender branding configuration; organization-admin-level setting outside this pass's write scope.
deletes org branding logo; organization-admin-level setting outside this pass's write scope.
uploads a temporary logo image; a binary-payload write, not JSON record data.
sets a logo image; a binary-payload write, not JSON record data.

bulk user-group membership update (add/remove many users across many groups in one request body); a distinct batch-mutation shape from the single-resource create action this pass models; not modeled this pass.
invites a new user into the organization; an organization-admin user-provisioning action outside this pass's write scope.

"Create a new Report from a sample" -- a create variant keyed by a sample-report enum id, distinct from and narrower than the already-covered create_report/update_report pair; not modeled separately this pass.

an alternate agreements-list path scoped under /user/me/; this connector's agreements stream already covers agreement listing via the organization-scoped path legacy targets (/organizations/{organizationId}/agreements), matching this bundle's pre-existing parity choice.
returns only an aggregate count, not record data; not modeled as a stream.

an alternate folders-list path scoped under /user/me/; this connector's folders stream already covers folder listing via the organization-scoped path legacy targets (/organizations/{organizationId}/folders).
creates a personal webhook integration tied to the authenticated user's own account, not organization CLM content; outside this pass's write scope.
